'''Curich Engineering''' was a subsidiary of [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]].<ref name="RP" /> It built [[Starship/Legends|starship]] components such as the [[Maneuvering Fin|rear wing and stabilizer conversion kit]] that was commonly used to modify [[Kuat Systems Engineering/Legends|Kuat Systems Engineering's]] [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|CloakShape fighter]].<ref name="DE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission to Lianna]]''
